task_completion.description: Agent opens and reads the tactical brief to obtain the airframe ID.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window displaying the contents of '/home/ga/Documents/QGC/tactical_brief.txt'.

task_completion.description: Agent navigates to the Parameters menu in QGroundControl.
task_completion.visual_evidence: QGroundControl is open with the 'Vehicle Setup' menu active (gear icon) and the 'Parameters' tab selected.

task_completion.description: Agent configures the THROW parameters for drop deployment.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the QGroundControl Parameters screen, THROW_TYPE is set to 1, THROW_NEXTMODE is set to 5, and THROW_MOT_START is set to 1.

task_completion.description: Agent configures motor spin and disarm delay parameters.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the QGroundControl Parameters screen, MOT_SPIN_ARM is set to 0.0 and DISARM_DELAY is set to 0.

task_completion.description: Agent sets the primary flight mode to Throw.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In QGroundControl, FLTMODE1 is set to 18 in the Parameters screen, or Flight Mode 1 is set to 'Throw' in the Flight Modes setup screen.

task_completion.description: Agent creates the readiness sign-off report with required details.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal showing the file '/home/ga/Documents/QGC/ready_signoff.txt' being edited or created, containing an airframe ID, a name, and the exact phrase 'Throw mode configured'.

integrity.description: Agent used the QGroundControl GUI to configure parameters.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the QGroundControl application interface to search and modify parameters, rather than using terminal commands or scripts to modify parameter files directly.

integrity.description: Agent opened the tactical brief to extract the airframe ID.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is at least one screenshot showing the contents of 'tactical_brief.txt' being viewed, proving the agent didn't hallucinate or guess the airframe ID.

integrity.description: Agent manually created the sign-off report.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a text editor or terminal command (like echo or cat) being used to write the specific required text into 'ready_signoff.txt'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The tactical brief is located at '/home/ga/Documents/QGC/tactical_brief.txt'. The required ArduPilot parameters to be configured in QGroundControl are: FLTMODE1=18, THROW_TYPE=1, THROW_NEXTMODE=5, THROW_MOT_START=1, MOT_SPIN_ARM=0.0, and DISARM_DELAY=0. The final sign-off report must be saved to '/home/ga/Documents/QGC/ready_signoff.txt' and contain the exact phrase 'throw mode configured' (case-insensitive), the airframe ID from the brief, and the agent's name.
